scripts.build: npm run build -w @skillset/shared && npm run build -w @skillset/server && npm run build -w @skillset/web && npm run build -w @skillset/cli
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @skillset/shared && npm run typecheck -w @skillset/server && npm run typecheck -w @skillset/web && npm run typecheck -w @skillset/cli
